games.name: LOTRO
games.description: Samen met je squad questen in Midden-aarde — wie als eerste level 20 haalt wint. Onderweg helpen mag (en moet).

games.name: The Lord of the Rings: The Battle for Middle-earth
Treasure Hunt
games.description: Ahoy, brave adventurers of RLP 2026! This year, fate once again calls fer those bold enough to seek the unknown. The Treasure Hunt be back — not fer the faint-hearted, but fer those with sharp eyes and a thirst fer adventure upon the high seas. And mark me words… the hunt has already begun. Only the keenest traveler shall spot the first signs and set foot upon the path to hidden riches and forgotten treasures.

race.goalLabel: Wie vindt de verborgen schat het eerst?

blocks.content: Pak het lekker zelf — bestellen kan bij de bar.
